# CI/CD Pipeline Project

## Overview
This project demonstrates a CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions to automatically deploy a portfolio website to GitHub Pages.

## Technologies Used
- Git
- GitHub
- GitHub Actions
- YAML
- HTML
- CSS
- JavaScript

## Workflow
1. Make changes in VS Code
2. Commit the changes
3. Push to GitHub
4. GitHub Actions automatically runs
5. Website is deployed to GitHub Pages
